raw_input:
PRODUCT SPEC — NovaPay Digital Savings Account

Product Name: NovaPay SmartSave
Category: Digital Savings & Investment Platform
Launch Date: April 2026
Company: NovaPay Financial Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (SEBI-registered)

PRODUCT OVERVIEW
NovaPay SmartSave is a mobile-first savings account that automatically sweeps
idle balances into liquid mutual funds, offering customers higher returns than
traditional savings accounts while maintaining instant liquidity.

KEY FEATURES
- Auto-sweep technology: balances above ₹10,000 automatically invested in
  SEBI-approved liquid funds
- Instant withdrawal: funds accessible within 30 minutes, 24/7
- Zero lock-in period
- Integrated UPI payments
- Real-time portfolio dashboard

FINANCIAL DETAILS
- Savings account interest: 4% per annum (RBI regulated)
- Liquid fund historical average: 6.5-7.2% per annum (last 3 years, source: AMFI data)
- Minimum balance: ₹1,000
- Auto-sweep threshold: configurable between ₹5,000 and ₹50,000

REGULATORY COMPLIANCE
- SEBI registration: INZ000XXXXXX
- RBI banking licence: partnered with SBM Bank India
- All mutual fund investments through AMFI-registered AMCs

TARGET AUDIENCE
- Urban millennials (25-38 years)
- First-time investors
- Salaried professionals seeking passive wealth growth

COMPETITIVE POSITIONING
- Versus traditional FD: higher liquidity, comparable returns
- Versus other neo-banks: automated investment (no manual action needed)

LAUNCH MARKETS
- Phase 1: Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Delhi NCR
- Phase 2: Tier-2 cities (Q3 2026)

blog_post:
**NovaPay SmartSave: A Mobile-First Savings Account with a Twist**

In a bid to attract tech-savvy Indians, NovaPay has launched its mobile-first savings account, SmartSave. This innovative product allows customers to automatically sweep their idle balances into liquid mutual funds, offering higher returns than traditional savings accounts while maintaining instant liquidity.

**Auto-Sweep Technology: A Game Changer for Savers**

One of the standout features of NovaPay SmartSave is its auto-sweep technology. According to the product spec, balances above ₹10,000 are automatically invested in SEBI-approved liquid funds. This means customers can earn higher returns on their savings without having to lift a finger. For instance, historically, liquid funds have offered an average return of 6.5-7.2% per annum over the last three years (source: AMFI data).

**Instant Access and Control**

Another key feature of NovaPay SmartSave is its instant withdrawal facility. Customers can access their funds within 30 minutes, 24/7, making it ideal for those who need quick access to their money. The product also offers a real-time portfolio dashboard, allowing customers to track their investments and make informed decisions. Additionally, integrated UPI payments enable seamless transactions.

**Configurable Auto-Sweep Threshold and Minimum Balance**

One of the most user-friendly features of NovaPay SmartSave is its configurable auto-sweep threshold. Customers can set the threshold between ₹5,000 and ₹50,000, giving them complete control over their savings. The minimum balance requirement for the account is a reasonable ₹1,000, making it accessible to a wide range of customers.

**Disclaimer:**

Consult a SEBI-registered investment advisor before investing in any mutual fund or financial product.

In conclusion, NovaPay SmartSave offers a unique combination of features that set it apart from traditional savings accounts. With its auto-sweep technology, instant withdrawal facility, and real-time portfolio dashboard, this mobile-first savings account is an attractive option for tech-savvy Indians looking to earn higher returns on their savings while maintaining liquidity.

As always, it's essential to do your own research and consult with a financial expert before making any investment decisions. With NovaPay SmartSave, you can take the first step towards smart saving and investing.

hindi_content: नवापे स्मार्टसेव, एक डिजिटल बचत खाता है, जो शहरी युवाओं और पहले निवेशकों के लिए डिज़ाइन किया गया है। उच्च रिटर्न प्रदान करता है और परंपरागत खातों से तेजी से लिक्विडिटी बनाए रखना, यह शांत वित्तीय वृद्धि के लिए आदर्श है। अप्रैल 2023 में चुनिंदा शहरों में शुरू होने वाला यह प्रोजेक्ट, आपको अपने सपनों की बचत बनाने में मदद करेगा।
tamil_content: நோவாபே சார்ட்ஸேவ் என்ற ஒரு தகவல் திருப்புமுனை, நகர்ப் புதுவாழ்வாளர்கள் மற்றும் முதல் பங்கீட்டாளர்களுக்கான ஒரு இணையத் திருப்புமுனை உள்ளது. பாரம்பரிய அகற்றுமுறைகளை விட உயர் வருமானங்களை வழங்குகிறது, அதே நேரத்தில் ஏட்டு செலவுகளை எளிமையாகக் கொண்டாடுகிறது. இது பாஸ்பர் செலவு வளர்ச்சி அடிப்படையில் உதவுகிறது. ஏப்ரல் 2023 முதல் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்ட நகரங்களில் தொடங்கி வரும்.
